assignments.name: Assign_NPPA_Not_Present_Subject_and_Body
assignments.label: Assign NPPA Not Present Subject and Body

value.stringValue: "Regional Director of NP/PA Services" Role Setup Needed for NPPA Mismatch Request Approval.

assignments.name: AssignVPONotPresentSubjectandBody
assignments.label: Assign VPO Not Present Subject and Body

rules.name: Check_Is_Bounce_Approve
rules.conditionLogic: (21 AND 20 AND 22) OR (1 AND 20 AND (2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6 AND 7) OR (8 AND 9 AND 10) OR (11 AND 12 AND 13) OR (14 AND 15 AND 16) OR (17 AND 18 AND 19))
rules.label: Check Is Bounce Approve

rules.name: Update_Term_Sheet_Status
rules.conditionLogic: 5 AND 4 AND ((1 AND (6 OR 7)) OR (2 AND 3))
rules.label: Update Term Sheet Status

formulas.name: fr_Subject
formulas.expression: IF({!var_ContractStatus} == "Approved" ,{!GetContract.ContractNumber}& " Contract Request is Approved", {!GetContract.ContractNumber}& " Contract Request is Rejected")

Flow.label: Clinician Contract Review Action Handler Flow

textTemplates.name: tt_ApprovalBody
textTemplates.text:
{!Get_User.FirstName} has requested your approval for the following Contract Request: {!fr_RecordLink}


Thank you, 

{!Get_User.FirstName} {!Get_User.LastName}

textTemplates.name: tt_RegionalDirector
textTemplates.text:
For Approval of NPPA mismatch “Regional Director of NP/PA Services” role is required to be setup for the following service accounts

{!var_AccountNames}

textTemplates.name: tt_VPOAbsentBody
textTemplates.text:
For Approval of Bonus Request “VP Operations” role is required to be setup for the following service accounts

{!var_AccountNames}

variables.description: VP Operations Role Setup Needed for Bonus Request Approval
variables.name: var_VPONotAvailableSub

value.stringValue: "VP Operations" Role Setup Needed for Bonus Request Approval.
